metadata.description: Curated GitHub Copilot agents, skills, and hooks for Microsoft Foundry, Fabric, Power BI/TMDL, Azure DevOps, and AI/LLM systems. Knowledge-base-backed with 90-day re-validation cycle.

plugins.name: everything
plugins.description: Bundle install: all 8 agents + 9 skills in a single command. Use this for the full set; use the individual plugins below for selective installs.

plugins.name: ms-foundry-specialist
plugins.description: Microsoft Foundry specialist — Foundry Agent Service, Foundry IQ, azure-ai-projects SDKs, Microsoft Agent Framework, OpenTelemetry tracing.

plugins.name: python-specialist
plugins.description: Python for AI/LLM systems — async clients, Pydantic + instructor, structured output, retries, tool-use loops, evals.

plugins.name: observability-specialist
plugins.description: Observability — KQL, Application Insights schema, OpenTelemetry, sampling, dashboards.

plugins.name: powerbi-tmdl-specialist
plugins.description: Power BI / TMDL / DAX — PBIP projects, DAX evaluation context, time intelligence, RLS, XMLA deployment.

plugins.name: eval-framework-specialist
plugins.description: LLM evaluation framework — deterministic + AI-assisted + agentic metrics, golden datasets, regression tracking, Azure AI Evaluation SDK.

plugins.name: microsoft-fabric-specialist
plugins.description: Microsoft Fabric — Lakehouse, Warehouse, OneLake, Delta tables, semantic-model REST API, Fabric SQL endpoint, Direct Lake.

plugins.name: azure-devops-specialist
plugins.description: Azure DevOps — Pipeline YAML, REST API, branch policies, workload identity federation, PR automation.

plugins.name: accessibility-expert
plugins.description: Accessibility / WCAG 2.1 & 2.2 — audits, keyboard navigation, semantic HTML, ARIA, focus management, screen reader compatibility, color contrast.

plugins.name: simplify
plugins.description: Refactors recently-changed code: removes duplication, dead code, and premature abstraction.

plugins.name: ultrathink
plugins.description: Forces structured deliberation for hard architectural decisions with tradeoff matrices.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Systematic 8-category PR review (security → correctness → error handling → types → performance → testing → observability → maintainability).

plugins.name: kb-revalidate
plugins.description: Re-validates knowledge-base files older than 90 days against authoritative sources.

plugins.name: agentic-eval
plugins.description: Designs eval suites for an agent — deterministic checks, AI-assisted scorers, agentic metrics, golden datasets.

plugins.name: adr-write
plugins.description: Authors an Architectural Decision Record (ADR): context, options, decision, consequences, and tradeoff analysis.

plugins.name: explore
plugins.description: Explores an unfamiliar codebase to build a mental model: entry points, modules, build/test commands, dependencies, conventions.

plugins.name: make-plan
plugins.description: Creates a detailed phased implementation plan with concrete steps, files to touch, tests to write, and definition-of-done.

plugins.name: spec-driven
plugins.description: Captures a feature specification (WHAT + WHY) before implementation — behavior, edge cases, success criteria, non-goals.
